content:
# BM25 Hybrid Search — Brainstorm Design Decisions (2026-03-27)

## Approach Selected: Composable Pipeline with Registry (Approach C)

Rejected Approach A (Monolithic HybridRetriever) — perpetuates architectural limitation, combinatorial explosion for benchmarking.
Rejected Approach B (Middleware/Chain) — shape mismatch, retrieval stages are a DAG not a chain, can't parallelize searchers.

## 13 Design Decisions

### D1: Four Stage Traits
Searcher, Fusion, Expander, Reranker — each behind an async trait. Searchers run in parallel, fusion combines, expander enriches, reranker re-scores.

### D2: RankedSet with CandidateScores
Each candidate carries component scores (vector, bm25, graph, fusion, rerank) for diagnostics + a single final_score for ordering. Component scores are never compared across types.

### D3: Generic ComponentRegistry
One generic `ComponentRegistry<T: ?Sized>` serves all stage types. Maps name → factory function. Adding a new component = implement trait + register (2 steps).

### D4: RetrievalPipeline implements Retriever
The composable pipeline implements the existing Retriever trait. RagPipeline sees no change — it still calls retriever.retrieve(). Internal composition is transparent.

### D5: FullTextSearchable as separate trait
Follows the pattern of QueryableStore / TemporalStore / GraphStore as independent traits. LiteStore implements via TantivyIndex, PostgresStore via tsvector.

### D6: Tantivy for LiteStore
tantivy 0.22 (pure Rust, no C deps). Index at .corvia/cache/tantivy/. Code-aware tokenizer for snake_case/CamelCase/file paths. Index is a cache — corvia rebuild reconstructs.

### D7: tsvector for PostgresStore
Generated tsvector column + GIN index. No additional dependency — native PostgreSQL full-text search.

### D8: RagConfig extended with [rag.pipeline] section
Backward compatible — if [rag.pipeline] absent, falls back to legacy rag.retriever field.

### D9: Hot-swap via ArcSwap
Same pattern as HNSW blue-green rebuild. Config change → validate_and_build → atomic swap. Invalid config rejected, old pipeline continues.

### D10: Fusion contract — output [0,1]
Every Fusion implementation MUST output final_score in [0.0, 1.0]. Enforced by debug_assert. Critical because GraphExpander uses final_score in blend formula.

### D11: Backward-compatible RetrievalMetrics
Extend with Optional fields (serde-safe), don't replace. New: bm25_latency_ms, bm25_results, fusion_method, fusion_latency_ms, stages.

### D12: Graceful degradation
Partial searcher failure → continue with remaining. All fail → error. Tantivy missing → degrade to vector-only.

### D13: Cold tier in tantivy not HNSW
BM25 can surface cold entries that vector search cannot find. Access triggers tier promotion (cold → warm). BM25 as cold-entry rescue mechanism.
